_comment: Box-select three regiments of different size AND density (Spearmen spawn TIGHT, Infantry NORMAL, Archers LOOSE by default) and drag a flank line to split them under the new default mode -- equal depth, space basis: every regiment forms up to the same PHYSICAL depth, so the tightly-packed Spearmen and the loosely-spread Archers end up with visibly different file counts even though neither is simply 'bigger'. A custom no-enemy scenario isolates the split mechanic from any combat.
